## Description

Briefly describe what this PR adds or changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Links verified (no dead links)
- [ ] Table format matches the [resource entry template](../templates/resource-entry-template.md)
- [ ] `Last Reviewed` date is current (YYYY-MM)
- [ ] Deliberate ordering preserved (intuition → depth → reference)
- [ ] `See also` lines used instead of duplicating content
- [ ] No paywalled-only resources without a free alternative noted
- [ ] At least one interactive/visual resource included if one exists for this topic
- [ ] Link checker CI passes
